problems.title: You trust your tenants. Then you lose your deposit.
problems.body: When the RDC weighs evidence, a clean Word checklist with no photo proof carries no weight. You walk in with goodwill, you walk out 12,000 AED short.

problems.title: Your photos are scattered across WhatsApp threads.
problems.body: When you finally need them as evidence, half are deleted, none are timestamped, and the tenant disputes their authenticity. Court inadmissible.

problems.title: You spend hours typing a report that gets contested anyway.
problems.body: Two hours of inspection writing, three rounds of email back-and-forth, and the tenant still says the wall scratch was already there. With no proof, you lose.

features.title: AI catches what you miss
features.body: Snagify's AI tags damage in your photos automatically. Wall scratches, paint wear, grout discoloration. You can't forget what you didn't see.

features.title: RDC-valid evidence by default
features.body: Every report ships with timestamps, dual signatures, photo metadata, and a SHA-256 cryptographic hash. The RDC accepts it as-is.

features.title: Free check-ins, always
features.body: Move-in inspections never cost a credit. We want every Dubai landlord to have that baseline protection, whether you pay us later or not.

pricing.reason: If you have 1-3 properties, credit packs are cheaper than any subscription. They never expire. Buy 6 credits today, use them in 3 years if you want.

finalCta.headline: Ready to protect your deposit?
finalCta.subheadline: Free check-in, no credit card needed.

problems.title: You moved out clean. The landlord still kept your deposit.
problems.body: Without a documented baseline of the apartment's original condition, every scratch, every stain, every dent gets billed to you. Even the ones that were already there.

problems.title: Your check-in was a verbal walk-through.
problems.body: Most Dubai landlords don't insist on a formal inspection at move-in. They benefit from the ambiguity later. Don't let that happen.

problems.title: Going to the RDC sounds expensive and slow.
problems.body: It is, when you have no evidence. With timestamped photos and a signed report, most tenants win their case in 30 days, often without even filing.

features.title: Free check-ins. Always.
features.body: Document the apartment's condition the day you move in. Costs you nothing. No credit card. No subscription required.

features.title: 20 minutes, room by room.
features.body: Walk through the property with your phone. Take photos. AI tags issues automatically. Sign with the landlord. Done.

features.title: Reports the RDC accepts as-is.
features.body: If a dispute happens later, you submit the PDF directly. SHA-256 verification proves it wasn't tampered with. Landlord disputes nothing.

pricing.reason: Move-in inspections are 100% free. You only pay if you want to do a check-out inspection at move-out. A 6-credit pack covers most tenants for life.

finalCta.headline: Don't move in without it.
finalCta.subheadline: Document your apartment in 20 minutes. Free.

problems.title: Guests damage things and dispute the charges.
problems.body: Booking and Airbnb give the guest the benefit of the doubt by default. Without timestamped photos showing the room before they arrived, you eat the loss.

problems.title: Your cleaning team is your only witness.
problems.body: When something is broken between stays, your cleaner WhatsApps you a photo. By the time you respond, the next guest has checked in. Evidence is gone.

problems.title: DTCM compliance is a moving target.
problems.body: Dubai's holiday home rules are tightening. Operators with proper documentation handle audits and complaints in stride. Operators without it get fined or delisted.

features.title: Booking and Airbnb-ready evidence
features.body: Damage claims to OTAs require timestamped photos and proof of pre-stay condition. Snagify's SHA-256 verification + dual-signed reports beat 'guest he said, host said' arguments.

problems.title: You live abroad. You have no independent record.
problems.body: Your manager says everything is fine. Or that something needs urgent repair. You can't verify either claim from London or Mumbai. You write the check on faith.

problems.title: Repair invoices feel inflated. You can't push back.
problems.body: A 3,000 AED bathroom repair that you can't see. A 'damaged' AC you have to trust was actually broken. Without photos and timestamps, you have no leverage.

problems.title: When you finally visit Dubai, the apartment looks worse than expected.
problems.body: Six months of WhatsApp updates, six months of trust. Then you walk in and find issues nobody mentioned. By the time you leave, the questions are still open.

features.title: Reports in your inbox the same day
features.body: Every inspection your manager runs is sent to you as a PDF the same day. Photos, condition, AI-tagged issues, dual signatures. You see what they see.

features.title: SHA-256 verifiable, anywhere
features.body: Reports can't be modified after signature. Cryptographically verifiable from anywhere in the world. If your manager edits a Word doc, you'd never know. With Snagify, that's impossible.

features.title: Compare cycle to cycle
features.body: Look at last year's check-in. Compare to this year's check-out. Spot drift, wear, recurring issues. Have data when you renegotiate the management contract.

pricing.reason: For 1-5 properties with 2-3 inspections per year each, credit packs are far cheaper than any subscription. Never expire. Use across all your Dubai assets.

finalCta.headline: Stop trusting on faith.
finalCta.subheadline: Get verifiable reports for every property, anywhere you are.

problems.title: Dubai rental rules are unfamiliar.
problems.body: Ejari, RERA, RDC, security deposits often kept on principle. Coming from London, Singapore, or New York, you don't know what's legal and what's a tactic.

problems.title: Your landlord won't insist on a formal inspection.
problems.body: Most Dubai landlords prefer ambiguity. They benefit from it later. By default, you walk in with goodwill, no record, and zero leverage when something goes sideways.

problems.title: By the time you understand the system, your first deposit is gone.
problems.body: Most expats lose their first Dubai deposit on damages they didn't cause. They learn the rules through experience. Snagify lets you skip that lesson.

features.title: Free check-ins
features.body: Document your apartment the day you move in. Costs you nothing. The reports are RDC-valid the same day. No credit card, no subscription, no commitment.

features.title: Built around Dubai rental law
features.body: Snagify's report format follows RERA inspection guidelines and the criteria the RDC actually uses when reviewing disputes. You don't need to understand the system. The report does.

features.title: 20 minutes, in English
features.body: Step-by-step guided flow. Add address, walk room by room, photograph, sign with the landlord. No prior real estate experience needed.

pricing.reason: Move-in inspections are 100% free for tenants. You only spend a credit for the check-out inspection at the end of your lease. A 6-credit pack covers a typical 1-2 year tenancy.
